docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 2/26/26 SC-108A MAILED TO EDUCATIONAL TESTING SERVICE. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CAI, JUNYI AS TO DEFENDANT EDUCATIONAL TESTING SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAI, JUNYI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-11-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $79.00 AS TO DEFENDANT EDUCATIONAL TESTING SERVICE
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAI, JUNYI
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAI, JUNYI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EDUCATIONAL TESTING SERVICE JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT V. PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAI, JUNYI
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT DENIED*** BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 2/23/26 SC-108 MAILED TO EDUCATIONAL TESTING. RETURN TO SENDER- NOT DELIVERABLE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN STANLEY, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT EDUCATIONAL TESTING SERVICE
*REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM* FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAI, JUNYI AS TO DEFENDANT EDUCATIONAL TESTING SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF JUNYI CAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDUCATIONAL TESTING SERVICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN STANLEY, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2026 - JUDGMENT.
